---
title: Publications
description: "Peer-reviewed journal and conference publications from the Doss-Gollin Lab on climate risk, flood hazard, and Bayesian statistical methods."
listing:
  - id: pubs-article
    contents:
        - /bibliography/publications/article/*.qmd
    type: grid
    sort: "date desc"
    categories: false
    sort-ui: [date, author desc, title]
    filter-ui: [date, title, author, details]
    date-format: "YYYY"
    page-size: 50
    fields: [date, title, author, image]
  - id: pubs-conference
    contents:
        - /bibliography/publications/conference/*.qmd
    type: table
    sort: "date desc"
    categories: false
    sort-ui: [date, author desc, title]
    filter-ui: [date, title, author, details]
    date-format: "YYYY"
    page-size: 50
    fields: [date, title, author, details]
    field-display-names: 
        date: "Date"
        title: "Title"
        author: "Authors"
        details: "Details"
  - id: pubs-forthcoming
    contents:
        - /bibliography/publications/forthcoming/*.qmd
    type: table
    sort: "date desc"
    categories: false
    sort-ui: [date, author desc, title]
    filter-ui: [date, title, author, details]
    date-format: "YYYY"
    page-size: 50
    fields: [author, title]

format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    toc: false
---

:::: {.panel-tabset}
## Journal Papers

:::{#pubs-article}
:::

## Conference Papers

:::{#pubs-conference}
:::

## Under Review

:::{#pubs-forthcoming}
:::


::::
